metadata.title: Consistent Attachments and Links
metadata.description: Consistent Attachments and Links Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Using 'Consistent Attachments and Links' plugin without proper configuration might lead to inconvenient attachment rearrangements or even data loss in your vault.
ast.target: 使用 'Consistent Attachments and Links' 插件而没有正确配置可能会导致附件重新排列不便或甚至在您的库中丢失数据。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: recommended to backup your vault before using the plugin.
ast.target: 建议在使用插件之前备份您的库。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Some of your plugin settings has been changed to their safe values.
ast.target: 您的一些插件设置已更改为它们的安全值。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: about how to use the plugin.

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: This warning will not appear again.

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If the setting is empty, no paths are excluded from attachment collecting.
ast.target: 如果设置为空，则没有路径被排除在附件收集之外。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Treat files with these extensions as attachments.
ast.target: 将这些扩展名的文件视为附件。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: linked files are not treated as attachments and are not moved with the note.
ast.target: 链接的文件不被视为附件，也不会随笔记一起移动。

ast.target: 你可以添加自定义扩展名，例如，

ast.target: 每个扩展名插入在新的一行。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: setting. Without proper configuration it might lead to inconvenient attachment rearrangements or even data loss in your vault.
ast.target: 设置。如果没有正确配置，可能会导致附件重新排列不便，甚至导致您的保险库中的数据丢失。

ast.name: error
ast.source: No Intl support, please use an Intl polyfill!
ast.target: No Intl support, please use an Intl polyfill!

ast.name: error
ast.source: Only canvas changes are supported for canvas files
ast.target: Only canvas changes are supported for canvas files

ast.name: error
ast.source: Node text is not a string
ast.target: Node text is not a string

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically move attachments when a note is relocated. This includes attachments located in the same folder or any of its subfolders.
ast.target: 当笔记被移动时自动移动附件。这包括位于同一文件夹或其任何子文件夹中的附件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically remove attachments that are no longer referenced in other notes when the note is deleted.
ast.target: 当笔记被删除时，自动移除其他笔记不再引用的附件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically update links to attachments and other notes when moving notes or attachments.
ast.target: 移动笔记或附件时，自动更新附件和其他笔记的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically delete attachments when moving a note if a file with the same name exists in the destination folder. If disabled, the file will be renamed and moved.
ast.target: 移动笔记时自动删除附件，如果目标文件夹中已存在同名文件。如果禁用此选项，文件将被重命名并移动。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When a note is renamed, its linked references are automatically updated. If this option is enabled, the text of backlinks to this note will also be modified.
ast.target: 重命名笔记时，其链接引用将自动更新。如果启用此选项，指向此笔记的反向链接文本也将被修改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the name of the file for the consistency report.
ast.target: 指定一致性报告的文件名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically collect attachments when the note is edited.
ast.target: 编辑笔记时自动收集附件。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Update backlink text on note rename
ast.target: 笔记重命名时更新反向链接文本

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Instance method `debug.destroy()` is deprecated and no longer does anything. It will be removed in the next major version of `debug`.
ast.target: 实例方法 `debug.destroy()` 已被弃用，不再执行任何操作。它将在 `debug` 的下一个主版本中被移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: accessing an object - but returnObjects options is not enabled!
ast.target: 访问一个对象 - 但未启用 returnObjects 选项！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Seems the loaded translations were in flat JSON format instead of nested. Either set keySeparator: false on init or make sure your translations are published in nested format.
ast.target: 似乎加载的翻译是平面 JSON 格式，而不是嵌套格式。要么在初始化时设置 keySeparator: false，要么确保你的翻译以嵌套格式发布。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This means something IS WRONG in your setup. You access the t function before i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage was done. Wait for the callback or Promise to resolve before accessing it!!!
ast.target: 这意味着你的设置中有问题。你在 i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage 完成之前就访问了 t 函数。在访问它之前等待回调或 Promise 解决！！！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: nesting options string contains interpolated variables with escapeValue: false — if any of those values are attacker-controlled they can inject additional nesting options (e.g. redirect lng/ns). Sanitise untrusted input before passing it to t(), or keep escapeValue: true.
ast.target: 嵌套选项字符串包含带有 escapeValue: false 的插值变量 - 如果这些值中的任何一个是攻击者控制的，它们可以注入额外的嵌套选项（例如重定向 lng/ns）。在传递给 t() 之前对不受信任的输入进行清理，或保持 escapeValue: true。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No backend was added via i18next.use. Will not load resources.
ast.target: 通过 i18next.use 未添加后端。将不会加载资源。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: no languageDetector is used and no lng is defined
ast.target: init: 未使用语言检测器且未定义lng

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: i18next is already initialized. You should call init just once!
ast.target: init: i18next已经初始化。你应该只调用一次init！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: hasLoadedNamespace: i18n.languages were undefined or empty

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [remark-wiki-link] Warning: please upgrade to remark 13 to use this plugin
ast.target: [remark-wiki-link] 警告：请升级到remark 13以使用此插件

ast.name: warn
ast.source: I18N was not initialized, initializing default obsidian-dev-utils translations
ast.target: I18N未初始化，正在初始化默认的obsidian-dev-utils翻译

ast.name: description
ast.source: only pasted images are renamed. Applies only when the PNG image content is pasted from the clipboard directly. Typically, for pasting screenshots.
ast.target: 仅粘贴的图片会被重命名。仅适用于直接从剪贴板粘贴PNG图片内容。通常用于粘贴屏幕截图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether to convert pasted images to JPEG. Applies only when the PNG image content is pasted from the clipboard directly. Typically, for pasting screenshots.
